name: Firehouse Caesar Salad Dressing
directions: Juice lemons.
Shread Parmesan cheese, use 3/4 in dressing and top salad with remaining.
Mix all ingredients together in a blender and enjoy.

name: Terrace Hill Vinaigrette
directions: Combine the first 5 ingredients in a small bowl.  Gradually add the oil, beating with a wire whisk until blended.  Stir in the tarragon.
Serve the dressing over salad greens.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Buttermilk Ranch Dressing
directions: Place garlic, salt, and shallot in food processor, pulse till finely minced.  Add parsley, continue pulsing in short bursts until minced.
Add buttermilk and mayonnaise and blend til creamy.
Serve.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Almost Classic Caesar Dressing
directions: In a liquid measuring cup, combine both types of oil.
Add all of the other ingredients EXCEPT the parmesan.
Submerse  a stick blender in to the mixture and turn it on moving it slowly up and down a few times.  It will thicken beautifully.  Stop the blender and add in the grated Parm and blend briefly.

If you don't have a stick (immersion) blender you can use a regular blender but then have the oils separate  in a measuring cup.  Start the blender and once the other ingredients are whirling away on high add the oils in a steady stream until thickened.  Stop the machine to add the parm and then blend quickly just to combine.  Can be covered and refrigerated for up to 3 days.
I hope you like it as much as we do.

name: Buttermilk Dressing
directions: In a jar with a tight fitting lid shake all ingredients  until mixed.
Serve over iceburb lettuce wedges or your favorite salad greens.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Homemade Caesar Dressing
directions: To Coddle Egg: (lightly poach to pasteurize).
Heat pot of water on stove to just about boiling.
Break egg into pot and let cook for one minute.
Remove with slotted spoon and put directly into blender.
Mix remaining ingredients into blender. (note: egg should be quite raw when it comes out).
Blend.
Chill.
Serve.

name: Mamma's Best Caesar Dressing
directions: Poach or soft boil 2 eggs (do not over cook) Yolks should be soft.
Put cooked eggs into small food processor- they should be hot.
Add olive oil until thick.
Add Parmesan cheese.
Add Lemon Juice & Worcestershire sauce (to taste).
Blend well in food processor until thick and creamy.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Add crushed garlic, blend for 30 seconds.
Coat clean dry romain lettuce & croutons with dressing, sprinkle with more Parmesan cheese, course ground pepper and sea salt, serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Aunt Trish's Salad Dressing (From the Pioneer Woman)

name: Dijon Dressing (Gluten-Free)
directions: Whisk all ingredients together in a small bowl or shake in a glass jar with lid on.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Lemon Vinaigrette
directions: Place the mustard, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Slowly whisk in the olive oil until the vinaigrette is emulsified.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Aunt Trish's Salad Dressing (From the Pioneer Woman)
directions: Place all the ingredients in a jar with lid.  Shake it up and then refrigerate at least 24 hours before serving.
Good on salad greens and pasta salads.

name: Creamy Pepper-Parmesan Salad Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl or jar, adding salt to taste. Stir or shake well to combine.
Cover and chill the dressing until you are ready to use it.
Let stand at room temperature for 5 minutes before mixing again and serving.
Dressing will keep for up to 4 days in an airtight container in the refrigerator.

name: Simple Coleslaw (Cole Slaw) Dressing
directions: Whisk together and add to one pound coleslaw mixture.
Refrigerate several hours before serving for best flavor.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: The Ultimate Best Homemade "Ranch" Dressing
directions: In medium to large mixing bowl, gently mix all ingredients thoroughly for about 5 minutes, scraping the sides of the bowl once to get all the missed items stirred inches.

name: Homemade Western Style Salad Dressing
directions: I just whisk this up in a pint sized mason jar, but you could also use a blender, hand mixer or stick blender. Combine wet ingredients. In a small bowl (if mixing by hand) combine dry ingredients, then add to wet ingredients and whisk vigorously until well combined.  If you like it thicker, add a little more xanthan gum (*a little goes a long way so be careful!). Store in the refrigerator.
*I had a bit of trouble with the xanthan gum clumping when whisking by hand. I will try dissolving it in the vinegar first next time, or making it in the blender.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Creamy Cilantro Lime Dressing
directions: Puree all ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth.
Taste and adjust seasonings if necessary.

name: Thousdand Island
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Will keep in fridge several days.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard

name: Honey Mustard Dressing With Stone Ground Mustard
directions: Whisk all ingredients together and store in a glass jar and refrigerate. It makes 1 Cup.
2 ENJOY!

name: Quick Thousand Island Dressing
directions: In a medium bowl, combine all the ingredients and whisk until well blend.
Cover and transfer to the refrigerator until needed. Yield 1 cup.
